ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN FAMILY HOUSING, L.P. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPEMENT CENTER, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-07-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARICELA RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT WITH THOMAS, LEGAL AID FOR OPEN DOOR LEGAL ASSISTING PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PAZ PERRY (#301165). DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN FAMILY HOUSING, L.P. IS NOT PRESENT. SMALL CLAIM COURT DOES NOT ALLOW LEGAL AID ASSISTING CLAIMANT IN OPEN COURT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE TO 3 MONTHS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0) SERVED JUN-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPEMENT CENTER, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARICELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN FAMILY HOUSING, L.P. CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPEMENT CENTER, INC $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, THIS JUDGMENT EXCLUDES PLAINTIFF'S ONE(1) MONTH'S OVERPAYMENT OF RENT WHICH IS NOW PART OF HER SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>);REMARKS: BAD ADDRESS. TENDERLOIN FAMILY HOUSING IS NOT LOCATED AT THE LOCATION PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARICELA AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN FAMILY HOUSING, L.P.
